text:
The is one of several families that live within the Walls. It is the family where Gunther Schultz of the Special Operations Squad hailed from.

Story

Eve of the Counterattack arc

Gunther Schultz is first introduced as a member of the Levi Squad.

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Gunther later participates in the 57th expedition outside the Walls where he is killed while battling the Female Titan.

When news about the Scout Regiment's return is heard, the Schultz family awaits Gunther's safe return.

Members

Trivia

Schultz is a name of Scandinavian and Jewish (Ashkenazic) origin taken from German word, Schulze.
